mood: Trustworthy, affluent, secure, grounded, and modern institutional.

typography.rules: Never use Inter for headings. Keep hierarchy gaps under 2 Tailwind steps. Tightly track large headings. Use JetBrains Mono for transaction IDs and financial numbers.

spacing_and_layout.strategy: Generous spacing on marketing for luxury feel; dense 'Control Room' grid on dashboard for functional density.
spacing_and_layout.landing_page: Wide gaps (gap-12 to gap-24), p-12 to p-24 for sections. Asymmetrical bento grid (grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12).
spacing_and_layout.dashboard: Strict grid hierarchy. Base grid: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4. Gap-4 to gap-6. Every pixel utilized.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: rounded-none or max 8px (rounded-lg) for a sharp, institutional feel. Avoid excessive rounding.

surfaces.marketing_header: Crystal Glass: backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/70, border-b border-black/5, shadow-sm, backdrop-saturate-150.
surfaces.dashboard_cards: Flat solid background, 1px subtle border (border-border), no shadow. Hover: -translate-y-1, shadow-lg, border color darkens.
surfaces.modals_kyc: Solid background, heavy shadow for depth. Do not use glassmorphism on regulated/health/finance data.

components_instructions.marketing_landing: High impact, storytelling, trust-first. Use text overlays correctly (bg-black/30). Hero image should be premium architecture.
components_instructions.dashboard_overview: North-star KPI header (Total Portfolio Value). Modular analytics screen with radial allocation chart and holdings list.
components_instructions.deposit_withdrawal: Balance summary first. Segmented toggle for Deposit/Withdraw. Clear fee/timing disclosure before confirmation. Progressive disclosure.
components_instructions.kyc_verification: Step indicators with stage titles. Short purpose copy under each step ('This helps us protect your account...'). Contextual help for finance terms.
components_instructions.transaction_history: Filterable table. Use standard badges for status (success, pending, failed). JetBrains Mono for monetary values.
components_instructions.investment_plans: Marketplace grid. Distinct visual hierarchy for ROI, duration, and min/max. Bold primary CTA for investing.
components_instructions.admin_panel: Dense data tables. Grid borders (technical look) to expose the skeleton. Clear approval/rejection actions.

libraries.charts: recharts (styled with Tailwind classes via Shadcn)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure minimum 4.5:1 ratio for normal text. APCA guidelines applied.
accessibility.testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='login-form-submit-button'). Convention: kebab-case, role-based.
accessibility.motion: Respect prefers-reduced-motion media query. Add aria-hidden='true' to purely decorative animations.
